Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd (UEN: T55Q8888R). This position is based in our Singapore office with an annual salary of SGD 120,000, payable monthly. Your employment will commence on 1 December 2023.

Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing below and returning a copy to us at your earliest convenience. Should you have any questions, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or via email at hr@quantumdynamics.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Sincerely,

Ms. Olivia Ng  
Human Resources Manager  
Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd  

Accepted by: _______________________  
Dr. Samuel Tan (NRIC: S7654321Z)
